during the cold war the united states was led by several presidents including truman kennedy nixon ford carter reagan and bush the soviet union was led by leaders such as khrushchev brezhnev and andropov these leaders shaped the political and military strategies that defined the era of tension and rivalry between the two superpowers the cold war was a time of significant global influence and ideological conflict that lasted for several decades
